audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for Jacob's final poetic sayings over the sons, Reuben/Simeon/Levi rebuke, Judah royal imagery, Joseph blessing, and burial command.

verses.restored: Jacob called his sons and said, Gather yourselves, and I will tell you what will meet you in the latter days.
Gather and hear, sons of Jacob; listen to Israel your father.
Reuben, you are my firstborn, my might and the firstfruits of my strength, excess of dignity and excess of power.
Unstable as water, you shall not excel, because you went up to your father’s bed; then you profaned it; he went up to my couch.
Simeon and Levi are brothers; weapons of violence are their knives.
Let my soul not enter their council; let my glory not be joined to their assembly, for in their anger they killed men, and in their willfulness they hamstrung oxen.
Cursed be their anger, for it is fierce, and their wrath, for it is harsh. I will divide them in Jacob and scatter them in Israel.
Judah, your brothers shall praise you; your hand shall be on the neck of your enemies; your father’s sons shall bow down to you.
Judah is a lion’s cub; from prey, my son, you have gone up. He crouched, lay down like a lion, and like a lioness; who will rouse him?
The scepter shall not depart from Judah, nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, until Shiloh/tribute comes, and to him shall be the obedience of peoples.
Binding his donkey to the vine, and his donkey’s colt to the choice vine, he washes his garment in wine and his robe in the blood of grapes.
His eyes are dark/red from wine, and his teeth white from milk.
Zebulun shall dwell by the shore of seas; he shall be a shore for ships, and his flank shall be toward Sidon.
Issachar is a strong donkey lying down between the saddlebags.
He saw that rest was good and the land pleasant; he bent his shoulder to bear and became a servant at forced labor.
Dan shall judge his people as one of the tribes of Israel.
Dan shall be a serpent by the way, a viper by the path, biting the horse’s heels so that its rider falls backward.
For your salvation I wait, Eternal.
Gad, raiders shall raid him, but he shall raid at their heel.
From Asher, his bread shall be rich, and he shall give royal delicacies.
Naphtali is a doe let loose, giving beautiful words/fawns.
Joseph is a fruitful son, a fruitful son by a spring; daughters/branches run over the wall.
Archers bitterly attacked him, shot at him, and harassed him.
Yet his bow remained firm, and the arms of his hands were agile by the hands of the Mighty One of Jacob, from there the Shepherd, the Stone of Israel.
By the Divine of your father who helps you, and by Shaddai who blesses you, with blessings of heavens above, blessings of the deep crouching below, blessings of breasts and womb.

The blessings of your father are stronger than the blessings of my ancestors, to the boundary of the everlasting hills. May they be on Joseph’s head, on the crown of the one set apart from his brothers.
Benjamin is a ravenous wolf; in the morning he eats prey, and in the evening he divides spoil.
All these are the twelve tribes of Israel, and this is what their father spoke to them, and he blessed them; each according to his blessing he blessed them.
He commanded them and said, I am being gathered to my people; bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of Ephron the Hittite.
In the cave in the field of Machpelah, before Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field from Ephron the Hittite as a burial possession.
There they buried Abraham and Sarah his woman; there they buried Isaac and Rebekah his woman; and there I buried Leah.
The field and the cave that is in it were bought from the sons of Heth.
When Jacob finished commanding his sons, he gathered his feet into the bed, expired, and was gathered to his people.
